mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admission_notice (application_id, notice_no, file_name, file_path, issue_date, issuer_id, issuer_name, download_count) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{noticeNo}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{issueDate}, #{issuerId}, #{issuerName}, #{downloadCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE admission_notice SET download_count = download_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, application_id, notice_no, file_name, file_path, issue_date, issuer_id, issuer_name, download_count, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM admission_notice WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
